supabase.description: Direct Supabase table query + RPC tool. Allows Claude to query contacts, scores, opportunities without writing Python.

google-workspace.description: Google Workspace MCP — Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets. 25 tools.

pinecone.description: Pinecone vector query. Allows semantic search over transcripts, dossiers, playbooks, emails namespaces.

langfuse.description: Langfuse observability MCP. Allows querying traces, token costs, and latency metrics across agents.

filesystem.description: Local filesystem access scoped to the Omerion project root and Google Drive Knowledge Base.

github.description: GitHub API — PR creation, code search, issue management. Powers Build Orchestrator automation.

token-savior.description: Structural code navigation MCP — reduces token usage by exposing AST-level symbol lookup instead of full file reads. Pilot: track token metrics in Langfuse for 1 week; remove if savings <30%.

discord.description: Discord MCP — send/read messages, create/delete channels, manage webhooks, react to messages. Allows Claude to make changes directly inside the Omerion Discord server.

hunter.description: Hunter.io MCP — domain search, email finder, email verifier, and email count. Primary enrichment tool for lead_scraper_enricher agent.

railway.description: Railway MCP — infra actions for the DEPLOYER agent: redeploy, rollback, smoke test, service/deployment inspection. Wraps Railway's GraphQL API v2.

firecrawl.description: Firecrawl MCP — scrape URLs, web search with full page content, map site structure, async multi-page crawl, structured LLM data extraction. Used by high_quality_lead_scraping, lead_scraper_enricher, biz_dev_outreach.

search.description: Search MCP — web search (Google organic), Google Jobs, RSS/Atom feeds, Google News via SerpAPI. Tools: search_web (market_mapper), search_jobs (biz_dev_outreach), search_rss + search_news (market research). Note: r1_market_tech_watcher uses feedparser directly at agent runtime; this MCP is for development-time searches only.

linkedin.description: LinkedIn MCP — profile scraping (RapidAPI primary, SerpAPI fallback for name lookup, Firecrawl fallback for page scraping), queue DMs + connection requests into outbound_communications, drain queue via browser-use sender. Used by linkedin_outreach and lead_scraper_enricher agents.
